title: workspaces — field-level data classification
description: Every column on every schema in this module classified by sensitivity tier. Drives DSAR (GDPR Art. 15) exportable-field selection, right-to-erasure (Art. 17) scope, encryption-at-rest policy, minor-data handling, and search-index eviction. Field paths use `Model.field` — dotted paths reference JSONB inner properties.

tiers.public: May appear in URLs, page titles, public search indexes. No consent required.
tiers.internal: Platform-internal state. Never surfaced to end users. Not personally identifiable.
tiers.confidential: PII that is exportable on DSAR and erasable on request. Standard controls: TLS + AES-256 at rest.
tiers.restricted: Sensitive PII or credential-adjacent. Encrypted at rest with KMS key destruction on erasure (crypto-shredding). Access logged.
tiers.regulated_minor: PII of a subject under the age of consent (COPPA §312.2 = 13; GDPR Art. 8 varies by member state 13-16). Enhanced consent + guardian-verification required before any processing.
tiers.regulated_health: Safeguarding / medical / physical-clearance data. Never present on workspaces models but the tier is declared here for downstream modules.
tiers.regulated_financial: Payment / banking / tax data. Never present on workspaces models (Stripe scope); tier declared for downstream billing module.

regulated_minor: Not applicable — workspaces models do not persist any data subject to age-based special protection. Downstream (athletes / users) applies this tier.
regulated_financial: Not applicable to workspaces. Billing module owns Stripe references.

erasureBehaviour.confidential: purge-with-audit-record — row anonymised, audit trail entry retains the original for legal-hold period.
erasureBehaviour.restricted: crypto-shred — KMS key destroyed, ciphertext left in place (irreversibly unreadable).
